August 5, 2021 
 
National Stock Exchange of lndia Ltd.  
Exchange Plaza,  
C-1, Block G Bandra Kurla Complex  
Bandra (E),  
Mumbai - 400 051 
 
BSE Limited  
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers  
Dalal Street  
Mumbai - 400 001 
Scrip Code : ELGIEQUIP 
Scrip Code : 522074 
 
Through : NEAPS 
Through : BSE Listing Centre 
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Sub: Audio call recording link of the conference call - financial results for 
the quarter ended June 30, 2021 
In continuation to our letter dated July 30, 2021, we hereby inform you that the 
audio call recording link of Q1 FY22 Earnings conference call held on Wednesday, 
August 4, 2021 at 5.00 PM is available on the Company’s website at 
https://www.elgi.com/in/analyst-conferences/  
This is for your information and records. 
 
Yours truly, 
For Elgi Equipments Limited 
 
S Prakash 
Company Secretary
